name: HELIOT.AI
description: Environmental intelligence and climate sensing for precision agriculture.
problemSolved: Farmers lack real-time environmental data for crop and resource decisions.
solution: HELIOT.AI delivers AI-powered environmental monitoring and farm intelligence.
impact: Deployed across pilot farms in Karnataka agri-corridors.

name: BhoomiCam
description: Land parcel imaging and soil mapping using drone and satellite fusion.
problemSolved: Land records and soil data are fragmented for small farmers.
solution: BhoomiCam creates unified land-soil digital twins for precision agriculture.
impact: Mapped 12,000 land parcels in Vizianagaram district.

name: QHills Technology Pvt. Ltd.
description: Hill road and landslide monitoring using IoT and geospatial sensors.
problemSolved: Hill roads face frequent landslides with limited early warning.
solution: QHills deploys sensor networks with ML-based landslide prediction.
impact: Monitoring 120 km of hill roads in Western Ghats corridors.

name: CropGen
description: Genomic and data-driven crop variety selection for regional conditions.
problemSolved: Farmers use suboptimal seed varieties for their soil and climate profile.
solution: CropGen recommends optimal varieties using soil, climate, and genomic matching.
impact: 22% average yield improvement across 4,500 Gujarat farms.

name: SrajanAI
description: AI-driven agricultural advisory and crop intelligence for smallholder farmers.
problemSolved: Farmers lack timely, localized crop advisory leading to yield losses.
solution: SrajanAI delivers vernacular AI crop recommendations using satellite and field data.
impact: Serving 5,000+ farmers across western Maharashtra pilot corridors.

name: Terrastack
description: DEM and terrain analysis for highway and port infrastructure planning.
problemSolved: Terrain complexity causes cost overruns in infrastructure projects.
solution: Terrastack provides rapid DEM processing and cut-fill optimization.
impact: Saved 18% earthwork costs on 3 national highway segments.

name: SparkyAI
description: AI-powered career guidance and skills assessment for first-time job seekers.
problemSolved: Youth struggle to identify career paths matching aptitude and market demand.
solution: SparkyAI uses psychometric and market data to create personalized career roadmaps.
impact: Guided 9,000 students with 62% achieving first job within 6 months.

name: Via Salus
description: Digital health and wellness platform bridging rural health access.
problemSolved: Rural communities lack accessible digital health and wellness services.
solution: Via Salus connects communities to telehealth and preventive care programs.
impact: Serving households across Andhra Pradesh pilot blocks.

name: Thazhal Geospatial Analytics
description: Geospatial analytics for coastal, land, and environmental monitoring.
problemSolved: Organizations lack integrated geospatial analytics for complex terrain.
solution: Thazhal delivers end-to-end geospatial intelligence and mapping services.
impact: Active projects across Tamil Nadu coastal and inland corridors.

name: GeoInfy
description: Geospatial analytics platform for infrastructure asset management.
problemSolved: Infrastructure assets lack unified geospatial visibility for planners.
solution: GeoInfy digitizes and monitors infrastructure assets on a cloud GIS platform.
impact: 10,000+ assets digitized across Hyderabad metro region.

name: Encode Nature
description: Nature-based livelihood programs combining ecology training and green jobs.
problemSolved: Rural youth lack sustainable livelihood pathways linked to local ecosystems.
solution: Encode Nature trains communities in eco-restoration and nature-positive enterprises.
impact: 3,200 youth trained across Telangana forest-fringe communities.

name: EELAB CARBON
description: Carbon credit and sustainability monitoring for agricultural operations.
problemSolved: Farmers cannot access carbon markets due to lack of measurement tools.
solution: EELAB CARBON quantifies farm-level carbon sequestration for credit trading.
impact: Registered 3,000 farms for carbon credit programs in Gujarat.

name: WeatherCast Solutions
description: Hyperlocal weather forecasting and climate analytics for farm planning.
problemSolved: Unpredictable weather patterns cause poor sowing and harvest decisions.
solution: WeatherCast provides village-level forecasts integrated with crop calendars.
impact: Improved sowing decisions for 8,000 farmers in Karnataka.

name: Kisan Rover
description: Autonomous ground rovers for field scouting, pest detection, and soil sampling.
problemSolved: Manual field scouting is slow and labor-intensive for large farms.
solution: Kisan Rover deploys AI rovers for automated field monitoring and alerts.
impact: Reduced scouting time by 70% across 200 commercial farms.

name: Polygon Geospatial
description: High-precision surveying and 3D mapping for urban infrastructure projects.
problemSolved: Urban projects face delays due to inaccurate baseline survey data.
solution: Polygon Geospatial delivers drone-LiDAR surveys with BIM-ready outputs.
impact: Surveyed 450 km of urban corridors in Bengaluru.

name: Navariti Innovation
description: Innovation-led vocational training for emerging technology sectors.
problemSolved: Vocational curricula lag behind rapidly evolving industry needs.
solution: Navariti delivers industry-aligned bootcamps with employer partnerships.
impact: 4,200 graduates placed in tech and manufacturing roles.

name: Oxbow
description: River and watershed GIS modeling for flood-resilient infrastructure.
problemSolved: Infrastructure near rivers faces unmodeled flood and erosion risks.
solution: Oxbow simulates watershed dynamics for resilient infrastructure design.
impact: Flood risk mapped for 8 river corridors in Maharashtra.

name: Addble
description: Last-mile logistics optimization for semi-urban delivery networks.
problemSolved: Semi-urban areas have poor address accuracy and inefficient routing.
solution: Addble uses geocoding AI and dynamic routing for reliable last-mile delivery.
impact: 96% delivery success rate across 15 Karnataka districts.
